backstory.original: Widdle is a Gnome turned Dhampir who has made it her life goal to destroy Strahd. Navigating this odd mutation will not be easy for her, but she has made a promise to herself to set a good example for Dhampirs everywhere, with the help of Rend and her friends, to show them that this life does not make you a monster. She is incredibly fast, has a big personality, and an even bigger trenchcoat full of tricks!
backstory.display: 威德尔是个变成半吸血鬼的侏儒，她所确立的人生目标就是毁灭斯特拉德。掌控这种古老的变异对于她来说并不简单，但她立下誓言，在伦德和她的朋友们的帮助下，一定要成为全世界半吸血鬼的好榜样，告诉他们，即使有了这样的人生，也并不一定要成为怪物。她有着无与伦比的速度和独特的魅力，还有一件大大的斗篷里装满了各种套路！

description.original: Widdle fires a firebolt from her enormous Blunderbuss, damaging a random enemy.
description.display: 威德尔从她巨大的火铳中发射一枚火弩，攻击一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Widdle fires a firebolt from her enormous Blunderbuss, damaging a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 威德尔从她巨大的火铳中发射一枚火弩，攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Widdle leaps out and bites a random enemy, dealing damage and healing everyone affected by Vampiric Gaze.
description.display: 威德尔跳出来并啃咬一名随机敌人，造成伤害并治愈所有受吸血鬼之视影响的人。

longDescription.original: Widdle leaps out and ferociously bites a random enemy, dealing enormous damage. She then leaps back into the formation where her Vampiric Bite heals her and everyone affected by Vampiric Gaze for an amount equal to her own max health.
longDescription.display: 威德尔跳出来凶猛地啃咬一名随机敌人，并造成巨大伤害。然后她会跳回阵型。她的吸血鬼之咬会治愈她和所有受吸血鬼之视影响的人，治疗量相当于她自己的最大生命值。

name.original: Only As Slow As The Fastest Link
name.display: 只和最快的链接一样慢

description.desc: Widdle charms those adjacent to her with her Vampiric Gaze, increasing their damage by $(amount)%.
威德尔用吸血鬼之视魅惑周围的盟友，使他们的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Widdle's vampiric gaze boosts the damage of all adjacent Champions
tipText.display: 威德尔吸血鬼般的凝视提高了所有相邻勇士的伤害

description.desc: Champions affected by Widdle's Vampiric Gaze have a $(amount)% chance to immediately reset their base attack cooldown after they attack.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Gives a $(amount)% chance to instantly reset $target's base attack cooldown right after using it

description.desc: 受威德尔的吸血鬼之视所影响的勇士有 $(amount)% 几率在攻击后立即重置基本攻击的冷却时间。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使$target有 $(amount)% 几率在使用基本攻击后立即重置其冷却时间

description.pre: $(if not incoming_desc)Champions affected by Widdle's Vampiric Gaze look extra tasty to the enemies. Each affected Champion increases the monster spawn speed by $(not_buffed amount)%$(else)Increase Enemy spawn speed by $(amount)%$(fi), stacking additively.
$(if not incoming_desc)受威德尔的“吸血鬼之视”所影响的勇士在敌人看来尤为美味。每有一位受影响的勇士，怪物的刷新速度提高 $(not_buffed amount)%$(else)怪物的刷新速度提高 $(amount)%$(fi)（以加算方式堆叠）。

description.desc: The effects of Widdle's abilities on Champions affected by Vampiric Gaze are increased by $(amount)% on Champions with a STR or DEX score of 12 or higher.
受到威德尔的吸血鬼之视所影响的勇士当中，力量或敏捷大于等于 12 的勇士所获得的效果提高 $(amount)%

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Widdle focuses her abilities on the Strongest and most Dexterous
specializationDescription.display: 威德尔把她的能力集中在最强壮和最灵巧的人身上

description.desc: The effects of Widdle's abilities on Champions affected by Vampiric Gaze are increased by $(amount)% on Champions with a INT or CON score of 12 or higher.
受到威德尔的吸血鬼之视所影响的勇士当中，智力或体质大于等于 12 的勇士所获得的效果提高 $(amount)%

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Widdle focuses her abilities on the Smartest and Toughest
specializationDescription.display: 威德尔把她的能力集中在最聪明和最坚强的人身上

description.desc: The effects of Widdle's abilities on Champions affected by Vampiric Gaze are increased by $(amount)% on Champions with a WIS or CHA score of 12 or higher.
受到威德尔的吸血鬼之视所影响的勇士当中，感知或魅力大于等于 12 的勇士所获得的效果提高 $(amount)%

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Widdle focuses her abilities on the Wisest and most Charismatic
specializationDescription.display: 威德尔把她的能力集中在最聪明和魅力无边的人身上

name.original: Only As Slow As The Fastest Link
name.display: 只和最快的链接一样慢

description.pre: Champions affected by Widdle's Vampiric Gaze have a base attack cooldown equal to the quickest of the affected Champions.
受威德尔的吸血鬼之视所影响的勇士的基本攻击冷却时间等同于受影响勇士中的最快者。

tipText.original: Champions affected by Widdle's Vampiric gaze get the same (fastest) base attack cooldown.
tipText.display: 受威德尔吸血鬼凝视影响的勇士获得相同（最快）的基本攻击冷却时间。

description.original: You stay back, this one's mine.
description.display: 你们到后面去，这家伙归我了。

description.original: What're you afraid of? We're gonna be fine!
description.display: 你在害怕什么？我们都会没事的！

description.original: Are you lookin' at my friends? Are you?
description.display: 你是在看我的朋友吗？是不是？

description.original: Look into my eyes -- right here, in the eyes, let's go.
description.display: 看着我的眼睛--就这里，正对着眼睛，我们开始吧。

description.original: Pick up your feet and follow me!
description.display: 抬起你的脚，跟我来！

description.original: How could they resist you?
description.display: 他们是怎么能忍住不吃掉你的？

description.original: I don't like to wait around, so let's get this party started.
description.display: 我不喜欢一直等，所以我们直接让派对开始吧。

description.original: I am a bit, yeah.
description.display: 我是挺厉害的，嗯。

description.original: There's gonna be some changes around here.
description.display: 这里会出现一些变化。

description.original: Come on, I know you can go faster than that!
description.display: 加把劲，我知道你还能再快些！

description.original: Get behind me -- I'll get us there in a wink!
description.display: 跟在我后面--我马上就带我们冲过去！

description.original: HUNGRY!
description.display: 好饿啊！

effects.description: Widdle also counts as Undead

description.original: Do you have any idea how difficult it is to keep Darklords entertained?
description.display: 你知道取悦黑暗领主有多难吗？

description.original: There's not a plane in the multiverse I wouldn't head to looking for Rend.
description.display: 我要去多元宇宙的每个位面寻找伦德。

description.original: Rend mighta started out as a pile of magic items, but I made him my best friend.
description.display: 伦德虽然一开始只有一堆魔法道具，但我让他成了我最好的朋友。

description.original: I don't have Rend with me, but with this I still have his help!
description.display: 虽然伦德不在我身边，但有了它，他一样能帮上我的忙！

description.original: I boosted it up. Rend's gonna love it when I track him down.
description.display: 我给它加了点魔力。等找到伦德，他一定会喜欢的。

description.original: It packs a punch.
description.display: 它威力十足。

description.original: Whaddya mean it seems big for me?
description.display: 为什么它对于我来说那么重要呢？

description.original: You oughta see the face people make when you load this baby with a fire bolt.
description.display: 当这玩意里面射出火球来的时候，你真该去看看那些敌人脸上的表情。

description.original: Guess what I loaded it with this time?
description.display: 猜猜这次我在里面装了什么？

description.original: Eyes are important. Protect your eyes. Making new ones takes too long.
description.display: 眼睛很重要。保护好你的眼睛。做新的太花时间了。

description.original: Pretty good for fine work. You need 'em if you're gonna tinker.
description.display: 精心打磨。想做修补工作的话一定会需要的。

description.original: These zoom in so close I can see the little vein in your eyeball there.
description.display: 它的放大倍率太高，我甚至能看到你眼球里的小血管。

description.original: Pretty sure I can see into other worlds now, the zoom's so good.
description.display: 我感觉现在我已经能看到另外的世界了，这放大倍率太高了。

description.original: I see why that old dust-bag liked sitting in this.
description.display: 我现在知道为什么那个老混蛋喜欢坐在这上面了。

description.original: It gives the room a certain ambiance, and I, for one, am into that.
description.display: 它能给房间制造一种氛围，而我，很喜欢这种氛围。

description.original: If somethin' falls through a portal with you, it's yours now. Rules are rules.
description.display: 如果有什么东西跟你一起掉进传送门，那它就是你的了。规则就是规则。

name.display: 斯特拉德之失，威德尔之得

description.original: If Strahd wants his chair back, he can come and get it. I'm ready when he is.
description.display: 如果斯特拉德想把他的椅子要回去，那就让他自己来取。如果他准备好了，我也一样。

description.original: Of course it has pockets!
description.display: 它当然有口袋！

description.original: Perfect for spell components, tools, and souvenirs!
description.display: 适合用于一切咒语构成、工具和纪念品！

description.original: One of these has Strahd's severed hand in it!
description.display: 其中一个里面装着斯特拉德被砍下来的手！

description.original: I can actually fit my blunderbuss in here.
description.display: 我还能把我的喇叭枪塞进去。

description.original: I'll be right back!
description.display: 我马上就回来！

description.original: I'm fast as heck, boi!
description.display: 我快得不得了，小伙子！

description.original: I'll figure out where I'm going when I get there.
description.display: 等到地方了，我就知道要去哪了。

description.original: What's faster than a wolf? Me, of course.
description.display: 什么东西能比狼更快呢？当然是我啦。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Gnome Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a NEUTRAL alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Widdle is a Gnome turned Dhampir who has made it her life goal to destroy Strahd. Navigating this odd mutation will not be easy for her, but she has made a promise to herself to set a good example for Dhampirs everywhere, with the help of Rend and her friends, to show them that this life does not make you a monster. She is incredibly fast, has a big personality, and an even bigger trenchcoat full of tricks!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Widdle speeds up and buffs all adjacent Champion attacks

event_upgrades.name: Only As Slow As The Fastest Link

display.name: 钢铁怒火护手

display.name: 奇怪力量护手

original.name: Basic Blunderbuss

display.name: 基础喇叭枪
display.description: 它威力十足。

original.name: Polished Blunderbuss

display.name: 抛光喇叭枪

display.name: 发光的喇叭枪
display.description: 当这玩意里面射出火球来的时候，你真该去看看那些敌人脸上的表情。

original.name: Blunderbuss of Power

display.name: 能量喇叭枪
display.description: 猜猜这次我在里面装了什么？

original.name: Rusty Coil Goggles
original.description: Eyes are important. Protect your eyes. Making new ones takes too long.

display.name: 生锈的螺旋护目镜
display.description: 眼睛很重要。保护好你的眼睛。做新的太花时间了。

original.name: Steel Coil Goggles
original.description: Pretty good for fine work. You need 'em if you're gonna tinker.

display.name: 钢铁螺旋护目镜
display.description: 精心打磨。想做修补工作的话一定会需要的。

original.name: Mithral Coil Goggles

display.name: 秘银螺旋护目镜
display.description: 它的放大倍率太高，我甚至能看到你眼球里的小血管。

original.name: Adamantine Coil Goggles
original.description: Pretty sure I can see into other worlds now, the zoom's so good.

display.name: 精金螺旋护目镜
display.description: 我感觉现在我已经能看到另外的世界了，这放大倍率太高了。

original.name: Battered Old Chair
original.description: I see why that old dust-bag liked sitting in this.

display.name: 破损的旧椅子
display.description: 我现在知道为什么那个老混蛋喜欢坐在这上面了。

original.name: Spooky Throne
original.description: It gives the room a certain ambiance, and I, for one, am into that.

display.name: 阴森王座
display.description: 它能给房间制造一种氛围，而我，很喜欢这种氛围。

original.name: Barovian Souvenir
original.description: If somethin' falls through a portal with you, it's yours now. Rules are rules.

display.name: 巴洛维亚纪念品
display.description: 如果有什么东西跟你一起掉进传送门，那它就是你的了。规则就是规则。

original.name: Strahd's Loss, Widdle's Gain
original.description: If Strahd wants his chair back, he can come and get it. I'm ready when he is.

display.name: 斯特拉德之失，威德尔之得
display.description: 如果斯特拉德想把他的椅子要回去，那就让他自己来取。如果他准备好了，我也一样。

original.name: Worn Cloak
original.description: Of course it has pockets!

display.name: 陈旧的斗篷
display.description: 它当然有口袋！

original.name: Versatile Cape
original.description: Perfect for spell components, tools, and souvenirs!

display.name: 多用途斗篷
display.description: 适合用于一切咒语构成、工具和纪念品！

original.name: Cloak of Many Pockets
original.description: One of these has Strahd's severed hand in it!

display.name: 很多口袋的斗篷
display.description: 其中一个里面装着斯特拉德被砍下来的手！

original.name: Cloak of Endless Storage
original.description: I can actually fit my blunderbuss in here.

display.name: 无尽储藏斗篷
display.description: 我还能把我的喇叭枪塞进去。

original.name: Quick Feet
original.description: I'll be right back!

display.name: 快步走
display.description: 我马上就回来！

original.name: Speedy Boots
original.description: I'm fast as heck, boi!

display.name: 速度之靴
display.description: 我快得不得了，小伙子！

original.name: Boots of Deftness
original.description: I'll figure out where I'm going when I get there.

display.name: 灵巧之靴
display.description: 等到地方了，我就知道要去哪了。

original.name: Boots of the Wolf
original.description: What's faster than a wolf? Me, of course.

display.name: 狼之靴
display.description: 什么东西能比狼更快呢？当然是我啦。
